---
title: "Publications"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

<style>
/* Custom three-column grid layout for the main page */
.pub-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 100px 1fr 280px;
  gap: 30px;
  align-items: start;
  padding: 40px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; /* Light line between entries */
}

.pub-number {
  font-size: 1.6em;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #222;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.pub-url-link {
  font-size: 0.85em;
  color: #0366d6;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: block;
}

.pub-cite-col {
  font-size: 1.05em;
  line-height: 1.5;
  color: #333;
}

.pub-title-text {
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 1.15em;
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  color: #000;
}

.me-underline {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.pub-image-col img {
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  border: 1px solid #eee;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

@media (max-width: 800px) {
  .pub-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 20px;
  }
}
</style>

{{< include 01_2024_sifix/entry.qmd >}}
